other: If {id:10814} is also active, they gain {st:DaughterEducationSpiderOutis} and {st:GotAComplimentIshmael}.
Unstaggers at turn end on her first stagger and gains 15 {st:ResentmentSpiderOutis}. She replaces a skill on the dashboard with her S3 or S3-2 whenever she has 15 stacks up to 3 times per encounter.

Gains {st:MiddleFatherGutsOutis} for 3 turns at below 50% HP, making her take significantly less damage and gain additional SP. She'll also get +10% damage next turn whenever she uses a fully unlocked sword skill (S1-2, S2-2, S3-2)
On death, her buff to {id:10415} is -20% damage taken and gain 1 {st:AttackUp} when hit (up to 2x per turn).
usage:
She largely works as a standard Middle Identity but with a few added mechanics, so do mostly the same things:
- Use Counters with 6 {kw:Envy} A-Reson.
- Attack enemies with {st:RetaliationBook} or {st:RetaliationBookSpiderOutis}
- Her or other Middle allies getting hit or using {kw:Envy} Reson gives her {st:ResentmentSpiderOutis} which is consumed by her S3 to give her {st:ReinforcedTattooSpiderOutis}.

{st:MiddleFatherSwordOneOutis} gradually unlocks during the fight, requiring you to consume 1, then 2, then 2 {st:CountSkillMidOutis} per step. Using her S3 or 6 {kw:Envy} A-Reson consumes a stack. When she unlocks a step, she uses her S3-3 at turn end. Each unlocked step gives her bonuses on her skills, while the final unlock replaces her skills with the upgraded versions.

Whenever an ally loses at clash at less than 20% HP (30% for {id:10814}), she uses her S3-4 on that enemy and ally. This deals more damage if {id:10814} is the ally targeted, and if she is killed, Outis gains {st:MidFamilyOutis} for the rest of the encounter. She can only do this once per encounter, so if she targets someone else, you won't be able to get the buff anymore.

passiveBonusNotes: Includes Avenging My Family and fully unlocked sword.

1111501.desc:
Turn End:
- Apply [RetaliationBook] on the unit that dealt the most Skill damage to an ally
- Apply [RetaliationBookSpiderOutis] on the unit that dealt the most Skill damage to this unit

Combat Start: Gain 1 [ResentmentSpiderOutis] for every Envy Reson. (max 7)

If the following conditions are met during the Combat Phase, gain 2 [ResentmentSpiderOutis]
- When this unit is hit by another unit's Skill (2 times per turn)
- When The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael is hit by another unit's Skill (once per turn)

If the following conditions are met during the Combat Phase, gain 1 [ResentmentSpiderOutis] (this unit and The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael getting hit do not count toward either conditional below)
- When a The Middle ally is hit by another unit's Skill (once per turn per Identity)
- When a The House of Spiders ally is hit by another unit's Skill (once per turn per Identity)

When this unit gains [ResentmentSpiderOutis], if the target has [RetaliationBook], gain an additional Stack of [ResentmentSpiderOutis]

Gain 1 [ReinforcedTattooSpiderOutis] every time this unit consumes 5 [ResentmentSpiderOutis]

【Effects apply only to The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael】
When The House of Spiders: The Middle Nursefather Outis is hit by another unit's Skill, Ishmael gains 2 [ResentmentIshmael] (once per turn)
1111501.name: Book of Vengeance - The House of Spiders Special Clause

1111502.desc:
This unit is considered as an Identity that inflicts [Combustion] and [Laceration]
If this unit's sword has [MiddleFatherSwordTwoOutis] or [MiddleFatherSwordThreeOutis], Skills that inflict [Laceration] are considered as Skills that inflict both [Combustion] and [Laceration]
1111502.name: Smell of Blood and Fire

1111503.desc:
Upon entering the Encounter for the first time, gain [MiddleFatherSwordOneOutis]

At less than 80% HP, use "Time to Unpack!" as an Unopposed Attack at Skill End, converting [MiddleFatherSwordOneOutis] into [MiddleFatherSwordTwoOutis]
1111503.name: Sealed Sword [Lævateinn]

1111504.desc:
If The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael is on the field alongside this unit, activate the following effects:
- On Clash Win, gain 1 [DaughterEducationSpiderOutis] (once per turn; if it was the first Skill this unit used in that turn, gain 1 additional [DaughterEducationSpiderOutis])
- On Hit using a Skill, gain 1 [DaughterEducationSpiderOutis] (once per turn; does not gain [DaughterEducationSpiderOutis] from using Cracked Coins)

【Effects apply only to The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael】
- When Ishmael wins a Clash, Ishmael gains 1 [GotAComplimentIshmael] (once per turn; if it was the first Skill Ishmael used in that turn, Ishmael gains 1 additional [GotAComplimentIshmael])
- On Hit using Ishmael's Skill, Ishmael gains 1 [GotAComplimentIshmael] (once per turn; does not gain [GotAComplimentIshmael] from using Cracked Coins; if the Skill that hit was Skill 3 activated as a Counter, gain 1 additional [GotAComplimentIshmael])
1111504.name: Parenting

1111505.desc:
If this unit is defeated at Encounter Start, or if this unit is defeated during the Encounter, Blade of the House of Spiders Ryōshū gains the following effects:
- Gain 1 [SojiRyoshuEchoPast]
- Take -20% damage
- When hit, gain 1 [AttackUp] (2 times per turn)
1111505.name: Saikai [再会] - The Middle

1111506.desc:
When this unit has [MiddleFatherSwordFourOutis]: When an ally that has less than 20% HP loses a Clash against an enemy, use "Good Girl. Your Sacrifice for the Family Won't Be Forgotten." Skill that targets the enemy as the main target and the said ally as the sub-target (once per Encounter)
- The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael has a 30% HP conditional instead of 20%

If this Skill killed an ally in The Middle, gain 1 [VioletDamageUp] next turn
- If this Skill killed The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael, gain [MidFamilyOutis] next turn instead
1111506.name: Thanks... Kiddo.

1111513.desc:
Upon entering the Encounter for the first time, gain [MiddleFatherSwordOneOutis]

When each Seal is removed from the sword, gain [CountSkillMidOutis] corresponding to the unsealing stage
- [MiddleFatherSwordOneOutis]: Gain 1 [CountSkillMidOutis]
- [MiddleFatherSwordTwoOutis]: Gain 2 [CountSkillMidOutis]
- [MiddleFatherSwordThreeOutis]: Gain 2 [CountSkillMidOutis]

When the following conditions are met, lose 1 [CountSkillMidOutis] (once per turn)
- Upon using the "Stamp of Vengeance" Skill, lose 1 Stack (including "Stamp of Vengeance" activation via Counter)
- At 6+ sum of Envy A-Reson, lose 1 Stack at Turn End

At 0 [CountSkillMidOutis] Stack, use "Time to Unpack!" as an Unopposed Attack at Skill End
- Turn End: At 0 [CountSkillMidOutis] Stack, and if this unit failed to use "Time to Unpack!" in that turn, use "Time to Unpack!" at the next turn's Combat Start
- While this unit's sword has [MiddleFatherSwordOneOutis], at less than 80% HP, use "Time to Unpack!" regardless of [CountSkillMidOutis] Stack

At 50%- HP, gain 3 [MiddleFatherGutsOutis] (once per Encounter)

When Staggered for the first time in this Encounter, recover from Stagger at Turn End and gain 15 [ResentmentSpiderOutis] (excluding forced Staggers)

Turn Start: At 15 [ResentmentSpiderOutis], replace a Base Skill on this unit's Dashboard with "Stamp of Vengeance" or "Complete and Total Extermination" (3 times per Encounter)
- Applies only on the Skill on the leftmost Slot's bottom row on the Dashboard
- This effect does not activate if either "Stamp of Vengeance" or "Complete and Total Extermination" is already in the affected Slot
1111513.name: Sealed Sword [Lævateinn]

1111521.desc:
Combat Start: Apply 1 [AttackDmgUp] and 1 [Protection] on allies that equipped Counter Skills (2 times per Encounter; excluding Clashable Counters)
- If the affected ally is in The Middle, apply 2 [VioletDamageUp] and 2 [Protection] instead
1111521.name: Someone Mess With the Family?
